title: Emma's Colorful Feelings
synopsis: Emma learns about different emotions with her family's help, discovering that all feelings are okay and normal.

pages.text: Emma woke up feeling grumpy. Her toy was broken and she felt mad inside. Red angry feelings swirled around her like a storm.

illustration.description: Emma with straight blonde hair in a ponytail, fair skin, bright blue eyes, rosy cheeks sits on her bed surrounded by angry red swirls and jagged lightning patterns, holding a broken toy
illustration.alt: Emma looking upset with red angry swirls around her

pages.text: At breakfast, Emma started to cry. The sad feelings felt like blue rain falling down. Mommy gave her a big warm hug.

illustration.description: Emma with straight blonde hair in a ponytail, fair skin, bright blue eyes, rosy cheeks being hugged by her mother in the kitchen with sad blue raindrops falling gently around them
illustration.alt: Emma crying with blue sad rain while getting a hug from mom

pages.text: "All feelings are okay," Mommy said softly. "Sometimes we feel mad, sometimes sad. That's normal for everyone."

illustration.description: Emma with straight blonde hair in a ponytail, fair skin, bright blue eyes, rosy cheeks sitting close to her mother, with swirling colors of red and blue mixing into softer purple clouds around them
illustration.alt: Emma and mom talking with mixed emotion colors around them

pages.text: Daddy helped fix Emma's toy. Slowly, the angry red swirls started to fade away. Emma felt a little bit better.

illustration.description: Emma with straight blonde hair in a ponytail, fair skin, bright blue eyes, rosy cheeks watching her father repair her toy, with red angry swirls slowly dissolving into lighter pink wisps
illustration.alt: Emma and dad fixing toy with red anger fading away

pages.text: When her toy worked again, Emma smiled big! Happy yellow sunshine filled the room like warm golden light everywhere.

illustration.description: Emma with straight blonde hair in a ponytail, fair skin, bright blue eyes, rosy cheeks jumping joyfully with her fixed toy, surrounded by bright yellow sunshine rays and golden sparkles filling the entire background
illustration.alt: Emma jumping happily with yellow sunshine all around

pages.text: Emma hugged Mommy and Daddy tight. "I love you," she said. All her feelings were important, and her family loved her always.

illustration.description: Emma with straight blonde hair in a ponytail, fair skin, bright blue eyes, rosy cheeks in a family group hug with both parents, surrounded by a beautiful rainbow of soft colors blending together harmoniously
illustration.alt: Emma in family hug with rainbow of gentle emotions around them

metadata.illustrationStyle: emotion mapped colors, angry red swirls, sad blue rain, happy yellow sunshine, abstract emotion backgrounds, Inside Out inspired, feeling visualization, color psychology

questions.question: What color were Emma's angry feelings?
questions.explanation: Emma's angry feelings were red swirls, like a storm around her.

questions.question: What did Mommy tell Emma about feelings?
questions.explanation: Mommy said all feelings are okay and normal for everyone.

questions.question: Who helped fix Emma's toy?
questions.explanation: Daddy helped fix Emma's broken toy, which made her feel better.

questions.question: What color was Emma's happiness?
questions.explanation: Emma's happiness was like yellow sunshine filling the room with golden light.
